My Hacking & Search Engines [Top 70]

My Top 70 CyberSec Search Engines & Hacking

Published on November 17, 2022 by tmcyber

CyberSecurity Hacker OSINT

9 min READ

  • Shodan

Search for devices connected to the internet Shodan

  • Wigle

Database of wireless networks, with statistics Wigle

  • GreyNoise

Search for devices connected to the internet GreyNoise

  • VirusTotal

Analyse suspicious files, domains, IPs, and URLs to detect malware VirusTotal

  • UrlScan

Free service to scan and analyse websites urlscan

  • Vulners

Search for vulnerabilities in a large database Vulners

  • WayBackMachine

View content from deleted websites or take a deep dive into the history of the web WayBackMachine

  • Netlas

Search and monitor internet connected assets Netlas

  • ONYPHE

Collects cyber-threat intelligence data ONYPHE

  • FullHunt

Search and discovery attack surfaces FullHunt

  • GrepApp

Search across a half million git repos GreApp

  • Crt sh

Search for certs that have been logged by CT Crt sh

  • PulseDrive

Search for threat intelligence PulseDrive

  • CVE

The CVE website was created to identify, define, and catalog publicly disclosed cybersecurity vulnerabilities CVE

  • ExploitDB

Archive of Various Exploits ArchiveDB

  • DNSDumpster

DNS Recon & Research, Find & Lookup DNS Records DNSDumpster

  • InteligenceX

Search Tor, I2P, Data Leaks, Domains and Emails InteligenceX

  • LeakIX

Search publicly indexed information LeakIX

  • Hunter.io

Search for email addresses belonging to a website Hunter.io

  • OSINT Framework

OSINT (Open Source Intelligence) Framework website, some links don’t work anymore but it’s still a good website OSINTFramework

  • TinEye

Reverse Image Search TinEye

  • Binary Edge

Scans the internet for threat intelliegence BinaryEdge

  • Alien Vault

Open Threat Intelligence Community AlienVault

  • GreyHatWarfare

Search public S3 buckets GreyHatWarfare

  • Censys

One can search through the Internet of Things using Shodan or Censys and find literally everything Censys

  • Ahmia

Ahmia searches hidden services on the Tor network Ahmia

  • Spokeo

Search by name, phone, address, or email to confidentially lookup information about people you know such as yourself, friends, family, acquaintances, and old classmates Spokeo

  • CentralOps

Investigate domains and IP addresses. Get registrant information, DNS records, and more—all in one report CentralOps

  • MX Lookup

This test will list MX records for a domain in priority order MXLookup

  • ViewDns.info

Dns look up ViewDns.info

  • Robtex

Robtex is used for various kinds of research of IP numbers, Domain names, etc Robtex

  • CiberPatrulla

Enlaces a Herramientas OSINT CiberPatrulla

  • IP2Location

Identify Geographical Location and Proxy by IP Address Ip2Location

  • MAC Look Up

MAC Address and OUI Lookup MACLookUp

  • IP Address Tools

Free IP address tools allow you to ping an IP address, traceroute an IP address, convert IP address into decimal value or CIDR format, and so on for both IPv4 and IPv6 format IPAddressTools

  • Hurricane Electric

Internet analysis site for the whole Internet Hurricane Electric

  • GPS Coordinates

Special tool for conversion of GPS coordinates GPSCoordinates

  • WhitePages

Find people, contact info & background checks, works goos with USA WhitePages

  • CheckHost

Check-Host is a modern online tool for website monitoring and checking availability of hosts, DNS records, IP addresses CheckHost

  • EPIEOS

Retrieve information linked to an email address, with our Europe hosted engine EPIEOS

  • HTTrack

It allows you to download a World Wide Web site from the Internet to a local directory, building recursively all directories, getting HTML, images, and other files from the server to your computer HTTrack

  • OSIRT Browser

OSIRT is your investigation, simplified; it provides a comprehensive, collaborative platform from artefact capture to report to court, all without the need to be an expert user OSIRT

  • Cover Your Tracks

See how trackers view your browser CoverYourTracks

  • Programmable Search Engine (Google)

Get started by providing some basic information about your engine. You'll be able to customize the engine's configs (Languages, regions, etc.) further after it is created ProgrammableSearchEngine

  • WikiMapia

Comunity world wide web map WikiMapia

  • I Know Where Your Cat Lives

World cat map, usefull for geo int CatMap

  • Blockchain Explorer

Search across all transactions on blockchain, usefull to find anonymous transactions BlockChainExplore

  • Ehterscan.io

The Ethereum Blockchain Explorer, find anonymous transactions EhterScan

  • PimEyes

Face Search Engine Reverse Image Search, limited, not free at all PimEyes

  • Tweet Mapper

Twitter geo location tool TweetMapper

  • onemilliontweetmap

World map of twitts onemilliontweetmap

  • whotwi

Graphical twitter analisys whotwi

  • Twwiter ID

Twitter ID and username converter TwitterID

  • Twiangulate

example: BillGates + Oprah, analizing relationship tool for twitter Twiangulate

  • Heavy AI

World wide TWEET MAP HeavyAI

  • Nameck_k

Check for usernames over social media Nameck_k

  • gigatweet/stream

View total Twitter tweets in real time gigatweet

  • Foller.me

Twitter analytics application that gives you rich insights about any public Twitter profile Foller.me

  • Social Bearing

Free Twitter analytics & search for tweets, timelines & twitter maps Social Bearing

  • TwitterAudit

How many of your followers are fake? TwitterAudit

  • TweetDeck

TweetDeck is your personal browser for staying in touch with what's happening now TweetDeck

  • Reverse Shell Generator

Reverse Sheel Generator ReverseShell

  • CVE Details

Data source vulnerabilty CVEDetails

  • VulnHub

Provide materials that allows anyone to gain practical 'hands-on' experience in digital security, computer software & network administration VulnHub

  • Hash/UNHASH

Generate hash out of the string and lookup (unhash) for hash value in our pre-computed hash-tables, and more HashUNHASH

  • Cisco Talos

Real Time World map, Query by IP, domain, or network owner for real-time threat data CiscoTalos

  • Temp SMS

SMS Receive textsms Online Instantly TempSMS

  • Sub NET

MAC Address Lookup, MAC address or vendor SubNET

  • Caja de Herramientas de Google Admin

Usa la caja de herramientas de Google Admin para solucionar los problemas que te encuentres en los servicios de Google Workspace GoogleAdmin

  • Pentest Tools

Start a full pentest in minutes with powerful cloud-based tools, plus flexible reporting, automation, and collaboration options PentestTools

  • SPF Record Testing Tools

Test an SPF record, Does my domain already have an SPF record? What is it? Is it valid? Kitterman

  • Hunter

Hunter lets you find professional email addresses in seconds and connect with the people that matter for your business Hunter

  • Privilege Escalation cheatsheet

Offensive privilege escalation cheatsheet PrivilegeEscalationCheatSheet

Grab this to your markers, y will update it often

cheers!
